jobs.prompt: 16:9 editorial illustration for a university lecture on systems of linear equations, Gaussian elimination, and matrix methods. Show a clean coordinate plane with two or three thin linear constraints intersecting at one highlighted solution point; nearby include a subtle visual hint of an augmented matrix block or row-reduction structure, but without readable symbols or text. The composition should feel mathematically precise rather than abstract decoration. Warm paper background #faf9f5, ink-like accents #141413, dusty blue #6a9bcc, terracotta #d97757, olive #788c5d. Quiet premium academic style, spacious layout, no UI, no labels, no readable digits, no formulas.
